name: Inline
description: Use OpenClaw from Inline DMs and chats with an Inline bot token.

inline.label: Inline
inline.description: Use OpenClaw from Inline DMs and chats with an Inline bot token.

uiHints.label: Inline
uiHints.help: Inline channel configuration for bot tokens, direct messages, group chats, and Inline-specific reply behavior.

baseUrl.label: Inline API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Inline API base URL. Defaults to https://api.inline.chat.

token.label: Inline Bot Token
token.help: Inline bot token. Use tokenFile, INLINE_TOKEN, or INLINE_BOT_TOKEN if you prefer not to store the token in config.

tokenFile.label: Inline Bot Token File
tokenFile.help: Path to a file containing the Inline bot token.

dmPolicy.label: Inline DM Policy
dmPolicy.help: Controls direct-message access: pairing, allowlist, open, or disabled.

allowFrom.label: Inline DM Allowlist
allowFrom.help: Inline user IDs allowed to direct-message the bot. Use * only with dmPolicy=open.

defaultTo.label: Inline Default Target
defaultTo.help: Default Inline chat target used by outbound message sends when no explicit target is provided.

groupPolicy.label: Inline Group Policy
groupPolicy.help: Controls group chat access: allowlist, open, or disabled.

groupAllowFrom.label: Inline Group Sender Allowlist
groupAllowFrom.help: Inline user IDs allowed to trigger the bot inside allowed groups. Leave empty to allow any sender in an allowed group.

requireMention.label: Inline Require Mention
requireMention.help: Require an explicit bot mention in group chats before routing a message to the agent.

replyToBotWithoutMention.label: Inline Reply Mention Bypass
replyToBotWithoutMention.help: Allow replies to bot-authored messages to bypass group mention requirements.

capabilities.replyThreads.label: Inline Reply Threads
capabilities.replyThreads.help: Expose Inline reply-thread chats through OpenClaw's thread API.

groups.label: Inline Group Overrides
groups.help: Per-group settings keyed by Inline chat ID, including sender allowlist, mention, and tool policy overrides.

accounts.label: Inline Accounts
accounts.help: Named Inline bot accounts. Account entries accept the same token, access, group, reply-thread, command, and streaming fields as channels.inline.

actions.label: Inline Message Actions
actions.help: Enable or disable Inline message-tool action groups such as send, reactions, read, edit, participants, pins, and permissions.

reactionNotifications.label: Inline Reaction Notifications
reactionNotifications.help: Controls passive reaction notifications queued into the agent session: "off", "own" for bot-authored messages, "all" for any authorized message, or "allowlist" for reactionAllowlist senders.

reactionAllowlist.label: Inline Reaction Sender Allowlist
reactionAllowlist.help: Inline user IDs allowed to queue passive reaction notifications when reactionNotifications is "allowlist". Supports the same ID/access-group entries as allowFrom.

commands.native.label: Inline Bot Command Sync
commands.native.help: Controls startup sync for Inline bot commands.

commands.nativeSkills.label: Inline Skill Command Sync
commands.nativeSkills.help: Controls whether skill bot commands are included in startup command sync.

execApprovals.label: Inline Exec Approvals
execApprovals.help: Inline-native exec approval routing and approver authorization. When unset, OpenClaw auto-enables DM-first native approvals if approvers can be resolved for this bot account.

execApprovals.enabled.label: Inline Exec Approvals Enabled
execApprovals.enabled.help: Controls Inline native exec approvals for this account: unset or "auto" enables DM-first native approvals when approvers can be resolved, true forces native approvals on, and false disables them.

execApprovals.approvers.label: Inline Exec Approval Approvers
execApprovals.approvers.help: Inline user IDs allowed to approve exec requests for this bot account. Use numeric Inline user IDs or user targets such as 123, user:123, or inline:user:123. If unset, OpenClaw falls back to numeric owner IDs inferred from commands.ownerAllowFrom when possible.

execApprovals.agentFilter.label: Inline Exec Approval Agent Filter
execApprovals.agentFilter.help: Optional allowlist of agent IDs eligible for Inline exec approvals, for example ["main", "ops-agent"]. Use this to keep approval prompts scoped to the agents you actually operate from Inline.

execApprovals.sessionFilter.label: Inline Exec Approval Session Filter
execApprovals.sessionFilter.help: Optional session-key filters matched as substring or regex-style patterns before Inline approval routing is used. Use narrow patterns so Inline approvals only appear for intended sessions.

execApprovals.target.label: Inline Exec Approval Target
execApprovals.target.help: Controls where Inline approval prompts are sent: "dm" sends to approver DMs (default), "channel" sends to the originating Inline chat/reply thread, and "both" sends to both. Channel delivery exposes the command text to the chat, so only use it in trusted groups.

streaming.label: Inline Streaming Mode
streaming.help: Unified Inline stream preview mode: "off" | "partial" | "block" | "progress". "partial" and "progress" use Inline edit previews for visible answer text; reasoning stays out of the chat-visible lane.

streaming.mode.label: Inline Streaming Mode
streaming.mode.help: Canonical Inline preview mode: "off" | "partial" | "block" | "progress". "progress" degrades to answer-only edit previews until Inline has a dedicated progress/reasoning lane.

streaming.preview.toolProgress.label: Inline Draft Tool Progress
streaming.preview.toolProgress.help: Accepted for shared OpenClaw streaming config compatibility. Inline does not render tool-progress text into chat-visible edit previews.

streaming.progress.toolProgress.label: Inline Progress Tool Lines
streaming.progress.toolProgress.help: Accepted for shared OpenClaw streaming config compatibility. Inline keeps progress/tool details out of chat-visible messages.

streaming.block.enabled.label: Inline Block Streaming
streaming.block.enabled.help: Enable chunked block-style delivery when channels.inline.streaming.mode="block".

streaming.block.coalesce.label: Inline Block Streaming Coalesce
streaming.block.coalesce.help: Merge streamed Inline block replies before delivery.
